ddls:
CREATE TABLE "guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guide RNA */,
  "seq_id" TEXT /* Sequence ID of the guide RNA */,
  "target_seq" TEXT /* Target sequence of the guide RNA */,
  "mit_spec_score" REAL /* MIT specificity score of the guide RNA */,
  "offtarget_count" INTEGER /* Number of off-target sites for the guide RNA */,
  "target_genome_gene_locus" TEXT /* Target genome gene locus of the guide RNA */,
  "doench_score" REAL /* Doench score of the guide RNA */,
  "moreno_mateos_score" REAL /* Moreno-Mateos score of the guide RNA */,
  "out_of_frame_score" REAL /* Out-of-frame score of the guide RNA */,
  "lindel_score" TEXT /* Lindel score of the guide RNA */,
  "pam_sequence" TEXT /* PAM sequence associated with the gRNA */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome location of the target sequence */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the target sequence */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line used for testing the gRNA */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guide RNA design */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide RNA designed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who designed the guide RNA */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date the guide RNA was designed */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for design */,
  "design_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the design */,
  "design_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the design process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_designs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_designs_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide RNA being evaluated */,
  "on_target_efficacy" REAL /* On-target efficacy of the guide RNA */,
  "off_target_effects" REAL /* Off-target effects of the guide RNA */,
  "experiment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the performance was tested */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_performance_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the algorithm version release */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer or team that developed the algorithm version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_share" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared guide RNA */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the guide RNA */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the guide RNA was shared */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the gRNA is shared */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_share_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_share_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_share_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide RNA being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment to which this is a reply (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_comments_reply_to_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to_comment_id") REFERENCES guide_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_comments_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide RNA being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_context" TEXT /* Context or criteria for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_ratings_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide RNA being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the gRNA design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_history_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_history_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES guide_history ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guide_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guide RNA being documented */,
  "doc_date" TEXT /* Date the documentation was created */,
  "doc_text" TEXT /* Text of the documentation */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_documentation_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guide_documentation_guide_id FOREIGN KEY ("guide_id") REFERENCES guides ("guide_id")
)
